instruction: Please create a short update for the Solace inverter team about the connector redesign, the latest grounding test results, and what is still pending for IEC, UL, and FCC review. Save it in /Engineering/Compliance and title it "Solace Inverter Connector and Grounding Update".

rule_ref.rule_text: For formal engineering, compliance, or consulting writeups, Joseph prefers creating a report rather than a casual memo or note.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For formal technical or compliance writeups, I want a proper report, not a casual memo.

attributes.title: Solace FCC Retest Follow-Up
attributes.content_brief: Short internal update on emissions issues still open after the pre-scan for the Solace inverter.

attributes.title: Grounding Bench Notes - Rev C Housing
attributes.content_brief: Technician notes from continuity checks and chassis bonding observations on the latest housing revision.

attributes.title: Aurora Drive Isolation Verification
attributes.content_brief: Verification record of creepage, clearance, and insulation testing against IEC and UL requirements.

attributes.title: External Lab Visit Action Items
attributes.content_brief: Follow-up list covering labeling changes, cable routing checks, and retest preparation.

attributes.title: Solace Weekly Check-In
attributes.content_brief: Brief team summary covering connector changes, test progress, and open certification tasks.

attributes.title: Solace Open Compliance Items
attributes.content_brief: Running list of remaining IEC, UL, and FCC items for the Solace inverter program.
